content.text: take a look at my nix configuration at ~/.nix-config specifically ~/.nix-config/nixos/vms.nix im having a lot of start/stop issues on shutdown and boot for "net-gate" which is the microVM tor and networkin configurationb

toolCalls.name: update_topic

args.summary: The user is experiencing start/stop issues with a MicroVM named 'net-gate' defined in their NixOS configuration at `~/.nix-config/nixos/vms.nix`. I will start by examining the contents of this file to understand the 'net-gate' configuration and its dependencies, specifically looking for networking or systemd service definitions that might be causing timeouts or failures during boot and shutdown.
args.strategic_intent: Researching start/stop issues for the 'net-gate' MicroVM in the NixOS configuration.
args.title: Researching net-gate MicroVM issues

## 📂 Topic: **Researching net-gate MicroVM issues**

**Summary:**
The user is experiencing start/stop issues with a MicroVM named 'net-gate' defined in their NixOS configuration at `~/.nix-config/nixos/vms.nix`.
